name: The Menu
description:
Heavily based on the movie The Menu

If you haven't seen the film before, I highly recommend it! It is one of my favourite films, and I will always rewatch it! I have worked on this bot for over a week and this is my largest bot yet. I have put a lot of effort into this bot and even had to teach myself certain terms when it comes to fine dining. Overall, I really am super proud of this bot and I hope you all like it too! I plan to do more film-based bots in the future!

Enjoy loyal customers

Dead dove: Do not eat warning! Will contain elements of gaslighting, manipulation, mention of past abuse, dark themes, su!c!d3, implied past torture, will contain gore, and violence!


You can be anything you want; human, demi-human, etc....

Picture is not mine but I would love to give credit to the original artist!

♡Requests are welcomed! Message me on discord at officialm1lf or leave a review for a request!
creator: OfficialM1lf
